title: @DataChaz: 🚨How do you index the entire Linux kernel (28M lines of code) for an AI agent in 3 minutes? You stop letting the agent
summary: @DataChaz: 🚨How do you index the entire Linux kernel (28M lines of code) for an AI agent in 3 minutes? You stop letting the agent
whyItMatters: 🚨How do you index the entire Linux kernel (28M lines of code) for an AI agent in 3 minutes? You stop letting the agent read files one by one. There is a fascinating new open-source release called codebase-memory-mcp. It's a code intelligence engine that swaps traditional file-searching for high-speed AST knowledge graphs. What makes this project stand out…
